match.value: How often does an HVAC system need to be inspected?

data.question: How often does an HVAC system need to be inspected?
data.answer_text: Commercial HVAC systems are recommended to undergo a professional inspection every quarter, i.e. at least 4 times per year. For high-frequency use systems (such as data centers and medical facilities), monthly inspection is recommended. Regular inspections can identify potential issues early, extend equipment life, and reduce emergency repair costs. Our annual maintenance plan includes 4 standard inspections.
data.notes: Published to HVAC maintenance landing page

match.value: What are the common causes of insufficient HVAC cooling?

data.question: What are the common causes of insufficient HVAC cooling?
data.answer_text: Common causes of insufficient HVAC cooling include: 1) Insufficient or leaking refrigerant; 2) Clogged air filter; 3) Dust accumulation on evaporator or condenser; 4) Compressor failure; 5) Thermostat malfunction. It is recommended to check the filter and refrigerant level first; if the problem persists, contact a professional engineer for diagnosis.

match.value: How often should HVAC filters be replaced?

data.question: How often should HVAC filters be replaced?
data.answer_text: Standard HVAC air filters are recommended to be replaced every 3 months. High-efficiency HEPA filters are recommended to be replaced every 6 months. In dusty or cleanroom environments, the replacement frequency should be doubled. We offer both standard filters and high-efficiency filters.

match.value: How to choose an HVAC maintenance service provider?

data.question: How to choose an HVAC maintenance service provider?
data.answer_text: When choosing an HVAC maintenance service provider, consider: 1) Whether they have certified engineers; 2) Whether they provide emergency response service; 3) Whether they have a transparent pricing system; 4) Whether they provide detailed service reports; 5) Whether they offer annual maintenance plans. It is recommended to choose a provider with a complete service process and good reputation.
data.notes: Pending review, content is somewhat promotional

match.value: What is the typical response time for HVAC emergency repair?

data.question: What is the typical response time for HVAC emergency repair?
data.answer_text: The standard response time for professional HVAC emergency repair service is on-site arrival within 4 hours. Our emergency on-site support service commits to arriving on-site within 4 hours and provides priority scheduling. Annual maintenance customers enjoy priority emergency response.

match.value: What discounts are available for summer HVAC maintenance?

data.question: What discounts are available for summer HVAC maintenance?
data.answer_text: During the summer promotion, the On-site inspection service enjoys a 20% discount, the annual maintenance plan is 1000 CNY off, and emergency on-site support enjoys priority response. The campaign ends on August 31.

match.value: What does summer equipment inspection include?

data.question: What does summer equipment inspection include?
data.answer_text: Summer equipment inspection includes: refrigeration system check, filter cleaning/replacement, refrigerant level check, electrical system check, thermostat calibration, and drainage system cleaning. A detailed report is provided after each inspection.

match.value: What does the annual maintenance plan include?

data.question: What does the annual maintenance plan include?
data.answer_text: The annual maintenance plan includes 4 on-site inspections, filter replacement, priority emergency response, detailed service report and operation training. Applicable to commercial HVAC systems.

match.value: What is the price of annual maintenance?

data.question: What is the price of annual maintenance?
data.answer_text: The standard price of the annual maintenance plan is 9800 CNY/year, with a 1000 CNY discount during the summer promotion, i.e. 8800 CNY/year. Includes 4 inspections and filter replacement.
data.notes: Pricing information may change, rejected for publication

data.title: ASHRAE HVAC Maintenance Standards
data.snippet: Commercial HVAC systems should undergo professional maintenance inspection every quarter, including refrigerant level, filter status and electrical system.
data.author: ASHRAE

data.title: HVAC Insufficient Cooling Diagnosis Guide
data.snippet: Five major causes of insufficient cooling: refrigerant leak, clogged filter, dusty evaporator, compressor failure, thermostat malfunction.
data.author: John Smith

match.value: Air Filter Replacement Cycle Technical Specification

data.title: Air Filter Replacement Cycle Technical Specification
data.snippet: Standard air filters are recommended to be replaced every 3 months, HEPA filters every 6 months. Frequency should be doubled in high-dust environments.
data.author: Indoor Air Quality Research Institute
